description: The full creative-strategy framework as one self-contained, installable stack. An orchestrator plus 15 independently callable skills across three layers: foundation (brand intake, product catalog, review audit, keywords, competitors), strategy (the creative strategy engine), and execution (hooks, mechanics, formats, analysis, copy standards). Takes a brand from understanding to strategically mapped ads. Self-contained: does not depend on any other package.

installs.purpose: Orchestrator: routes the 15-skill framework across foundation, strategy, and execution layers
Standalone callable: brand identity, value prop, audience, positioning
Standalone callable: voice of customer across pain/desire/objection/comparison/use-case
Standalone callable: audience search and pain language
Standalone callable: competitive landscape and gaps
Standalone callable: persona x pain micropersona, offer, funnel stage, messaging lens (the strategy spine)
Standalone callable: reverse-engineer any existing ad
Standalone callable: library of cognitive mechanisms
Standalone callable: 10-point hook scoring from text inputs
Standalone callable: native-feeling hook template swipe file
Standalone callable: hook writing with psychological triggers
Standalone callable: format selection with funnel fit
Local routing index for saved creative-strategy bundles
Global INDEX.md routing entry for the creative-strategy bundle

changelog.notes: Initial release of the consolidated creative-strategy stack: one orchestrator plus 15 independently callable skills across foundation, strategy, and execution layers. Self-contained and installable in any org. Skill bodies are harness-neutral (no environment-specific tool names). Ships the updated creative-strategy-engine framework.

post-install.name: Introduce the new capability
post-install.description: Read post-install-intro.md from this package folder. After all prior install steps complete, surface the file's sections to the user in chat as the closing message of the install turn: '## What just opened up' as prose, '## Try this now' as a numbered prompt list, '## Compounds with' only when present and at least one named use case is installed.
